description_long: This is an adult pedestrian dressed in urban winter attire, featuring a long hooded coat layered over a zip-up hoodie and a shirt. The individual wears fitted pants and tall, heeled boots with buckled straps, giving a modern, slightly edgy appearance. Gloves cover both hands, and the person is accessorized with glasses and a necklace, adding to the urban sophistication. The coat has visible seam and buckle details, and the hood is worn up, partially covering the hair. The overall silhouette is slim and upright, with arms slightly extended to the sides. The clothing appears thick and suitable for cold weather, with a focus on both style and practicality.
description: An adult pedestrian in a long hooded coat, gloves, and tall heeled boots, accessorized with glasses and a necklace, dressed for cold urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view shows the hooded coat open at the front, glasses, necklace, gloves, and the full detail of the boots and layered clothing.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the hood, the fitted nature of the coat, and the layered boots.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the hood, the coat's length, and the seam and buckle details on the coat and boots.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the coat, gloves, and boots, with hair partially visible under the hood.
attribute_clothing_type: long hooded winter coat over a zip-up hoodie and shirt, fitted pants, gloves, and tall heeled boots with buckles
attribute_hairstyle: straight, shoulder-length hair partially covered by a hood
